title: Saint Seiya New Generation
description: This is a adventure mod, based on the theme of Saint Seiya
body:
Hello, this is my first mod, i hope you will like it. Don't hesitate to give me feedback on the mod.
Some update will come, in a another time.

We have a discord server now, here is the link
[https://discord.gg/JNqrnxdjVE](https://discord.gg/JNqrnxdjVE)

**Dependencies**
Curios API

**WARNING**

This mod is inspired by the work of Saint Seiya, which was created and belongs to the mangaka Masami Kurumada.
I do not claim to have any rights to this work and this mod is not for financial purposes.
This is only a mod, made by a fan for other fans of this rich universe that is Saint Seiya.

_Context_

When the world is gripped by the forces of evil, the Knights of Athena appear to defend peace and justice on Earth.
Play a new scenario, in this mod where you can trace your own story within chivalry.
Awaken your 6th sense and get your own armor!
Explore Greece or the famous Jamir region.
Fight black knights and increase your power to the 7th sense!

**Commands :** 
1. P - Main Story
2. Shift + C - Load 6th sense
3. C - Release 6th sense
4. Shift + B - Load 7th sense
5. B - Release 7th sense
6. K - Powers (have armor already equipped)
7. R - Pandora Box (have armor already equipped)
8. Z - First attack of cosmos
9. X - Second attack of cosmos
10. C - Blocking
11. O - Sense around you

**Camps available :** 

![Athena logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c414b18c664343ec85d4aa3d7812b8a198e9e02d.png)

Athena is the goddess of war and peace on earth. She is protected by her knights, who are under the protection of the 88 constellations. She protects planet Earth from the gods who want to take it over. Every 250 years, a holy war between Athena and Hades breaks out to fight over the right to own planet Earth.



**Armors available :** 


_Bronze Cloth_
- Pegasus (V1, V2, V3)
- Dragon (V1, V2, V3)
- Cygnus (V1, V2, V3)
- Andromeda (V1, V2, V3)
- Phoenix (V1, V2, V3)
- Unicorn 
- Bear 
- Lionet 
- Hydra 
- Wolf 

_Black Cloth_ 
- Pegasus
- Dragon
- Andromeda
- Phoenix
- Cygnus

_Silver Cloth_
- Eagle
- Ophiuchus
- Crow
- Lizard
- Hound
- Canis Major
- Whale
- Musca
- Centaurus
- Heracles
- Perseus
- Cepheus
- Sagitta
- Cerberus
- Auriga

_Gold Cloth_ 
- Aries
- Taurus
- Gemini
- Cancer
- Leo
- Virgo
- Libra
- Scorpio
- Sagittarius
- Capricorn
- Aquarius
- Pisces

_God Cloth_ 
- Great Pope
- Ares Pope
- Athena (soon)
  

![Odin Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fcc0e077e0cd3fe947b6fb7ed7c14df06d2acfc.png)

Odin is the king of the gods in Norse mythology. He is the guardian of the land of Asgard, which he protects from flooding thanks to his divine representative on earth.

**Armors available :**


_God robes (Bronze level)_
- Deer
- Harp
- Saber-toothed tiger

_God robes (Gold level)_
- Megrez
- Benetnash
- Alcor
- Merak
- Mizar
- Phecda
- Alioth
- Dubhe

_God Robes (God level)_
- Odin


![poseidon logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c58fc3b2ac21f5035d928eaa6a273d6bdc65fb.png)

Poseidon is the god of the seas and oceans. He is protected by his army of Atlantian soldiers, commanded by the 7 marina generals. He's had enough of human pollution of the oceans, and wants to sink the world beneath the oceans, to reign supreme.

**Armors available :**

_Scales (Bronze level)_
- Leviathan
- Ophiotauros
- Mermaid

_Scales (Gold level)_
- Sea Dragon
- Kraken
- Siren
- Chrysaor
- Sea Horse
- Lyumnade
- Scylla

_Scales (God Level)_
- Poseidon


![Hades logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a675efe6f349777b322a6ddb0c76ca90e759fec8.png)


Hades is the god of the Underworld. He is supported by the god of death, Thanatos, and the god of sleep, Hypnos. He is accompanied by his faithful commander Pandora. He is protected by his army of 108 spectres, all under the control of an evil star. Every 250 years, a holy war between Athena and Hades breaks out to fight over the right to own planet Earth.

**Camp unavailable for the moment**
